justification: The diff correctly updates the Java version to 21 in pom.xml and modernizes the maven-compiler-plugin configuration using the <release> flag. It also cleans up unused imports (e.g., ChangeSetPersister, ApplicationContext, Arrays). However, it does not introduce any Java 21-specific idioms (like virtual threads, pattern matching for switch, or records), limiting the idiomatic score. The changes are coherent and focused on migration prerequisites without spurious churn.
